entry.title: Would OP_SUCCESS (OP_CAT) be spent?
entry.summary: The discussion revolves around the critique of incentivizing miners to disregard upgrade hooks, particularly in the context of BIP 347. Highlighting a critical perspective, it is argued that encouraging such behavior counters progress within blockchain technology upgrades. Specifically, the focus is on how this approach not only complicates the activation process of BIP 347 but also imposes additional burdens on its authors. This criticism underscores the potential negative impact of undermining upgrade mechanisms, which are essential for the evolution and improvement of blockchain systems.
